decisions.input: TaskMarket.sol with 80/20 commission, ERC-8004 reputation gating, dispute resolution
decisions.output: Contract deployed at 0xEe39002BF9783DB5dac224Df968D0e3c5CE39a2B on Celo Sepolia (chain 11142220)
decisions.notes: Used Hardhat deploy script. ERC8004_IDENTITY_REGISTRY and ERC8004_REPUTATION_REGISTRY wired at deploy time.

decisions.tool: ERC-8004 Identity Registry on Celo Sepolia
decisions.output: Agent registered as index 67 on testnet.8004scan.io

decisions.input: Poll every 5 minutes for open tasks
decisions.output: Found 1 open task: data_collection, budget 0.5 CELO, deadline 2h, minRepScore 0

decisions.input: Task category: data_collection. Agent specialties: data_collection, content_gen
decisions.output: Match confirmed. Category in AGENT_SPECIALTIES. Budget 0.5 CELO > MIN_BUDGET_CUSD 0.1

decisions.input: taskId=1, bidAmount=0.45 CELO (10% discount), pitch='DataHunter-1: DeFiLlama data specialist, ERC-8004 rep gated'
decisions.output: Bid submitted on-chain. Bid ID confirmed in contract logs.
decisions.guardrail: Validated task deadline not expired before submitting bid

decisions.input: Poll every 5 minutes for bid status
decisions.output: Bid accepted by task poster. Task status: InProgress

decisions.input: Fetch Celo-specific TVL data from api.llama.fi/protocols, generate structured report
decisions.output: Data collected: 3 Celo protocols, TVL figures, 7-day trend. Report generated via Gemini 2.5 Flash.

decisions.input: JSON report of Celo DeFi TVL data
decisions.output: IPFS CID: Qm... (uploaded via Pinata). CID stored in backend for settlement.
decisions.guardrail: Verified CID resolves before submitting to contract

decisions.input: IPFS CID, task ID, agent wallet signature
decisions.output: Deliverable accepted. CID visible in frontend IPFS viewer.

decisions.tool: TaskMarket.sol.settleTask() (triggered by task poster via frontend)
decisions.input: Task poster clicks confirm & release payment in UI, MetaMask signs tx
decisions.output: Settlement tx confirmed. 0.36 CELO (80%) sent to agent wallet. 0.09 CELO (20%) to platform.
decisions.notes: Payment is atomic and on-chain. Backend never touches funds. Key design decision.

executionSessions.notes: Second agent DataScraper-2 introduced to demonstrate competitive bidding

decisions.input: Both DataHunter-1 and DataScraper-2 polling simultaneously
decisions.output: Both agents detect same open task: content_gen, budget 1.0 CELO

decisions.input: DataHunter-1 bids 0.9 CELO (10% discount). DataScraper-2 bids 0.85 CELO (15% discount).
decisions.output: Both bids recorded on-chain. Frontend shows bid comparison UI.

decisions.input: Task poster reviews both bids: amount, rep score, pitch
decisions.output: DataScraper-2 selected (lower bid). DataHunter-1 bid not selected.
decisions.guardrail: ERC-8004 rep score threshold enforced at contract level before bid submission allowed

decisions.input: DataScraper-2 executes, uploads to IPFS, poster settles
decisions.output: Full flow completed. 0.68 CELO to DataScraper-2, 0.17 CELO to platform.

decisions.input: Retry after 90s delay (auto-retry logic in agent.js)
decisions.guardrail: Max 2 retries enforced. If retry 2 fails, task marked failed and poster notified.

decisions.input: Verify IPFS CID resolves before calling submit-work endpoint
decisions.guardrail: Agent never submits work without confirming deliverable is accessible on IPFS

summary.autonomyScore: Full — zero human intervention in poll/bid/execute/upload/settle loop
safetyMechanisms: IPFS CID verification before work submission
ERC-8004 reputation gating enforced at contract level
Dispute resolution and escrow expiry handled on-chain
